boundary: Autonomous local learning and optional live retrieval; not a pretrained frontier model.
local_checks: python carl_autonomous.py --ask 'index <file>' then ask knowledge from indexed text
python carl_autonomous.py --ask 'web: current test' verifies opt-in web fallback when network is unavailable
enabled_runtime_systems: autonomous local document indexing and retrieval
web results are stored back into the local knowledge index
